missing_info: Which device/IP performed the pings (source) that reported 0/25 to 172.16.0.12? (needed to evaluate ACLs/routing path)
Run a ping to 172.16.0.12 from R2 (172.16.0.1) and paste the full output (to determine local LAN reachability).
On R2, provide: 'show ip arp 172.16.0.12' and 'show ip interface brief | include 172.16.0.1' (to confirm ARP entry and interface operational state).

If available, provide the server's network status: is the host powered on and does it report IP 172.16.0.12 and gateway 172.16.0.1? If possible, provide the server's NIC status or local ping from another host on the 172.16.0.0/24 network.
From which device and IP were the 25 pings to 172.16.0.12 originated? (confirm source device/location)
Show R2 LAN interface status and IP brief (e.g. show ip interface brief or show interfaces GigabitEthernet0/0/0) to confirm the 172.16.0.0/24 interface is up
Show R2 ARP entry for the host: (show ip arp 172.16.0.12) to confirm L2 adjacency
Attempt a ping to 172.16.0.12 from R2 itself and provide the result (ping 172.16.0.12 source 172.16.0.1)
Provide the server 172.16.0.12 host status: is the host powered on, NIC link up, and is its IP configured correctly (or provide server-side ping/ARP/ifconfig/ipconfig)

plan_history.intent_description: Investigate loss of connectivity to server 172.16.0.12 (0/25 pings); determine root cause and required remediation.
plan_history.problem: Server 172.16.0.12 is unreachable (0/25 ICMP replies). Root cause not determined due to missing source/device and device-state information.
plan_history.fix_summary: Cannot safely apply a remediation without source and device-level information. Collect the missing operational details listed in diagnosis.missing_info; once provided, create targeted remediation (interface/ACL/ARP/route change) on the relevant router (assumed router2) to restore connectivity.

plan_history.intent_description: Investigate loss of connectivity to server 172.16.0.12 (0/25 pings); determine root cause and required remediation.
plan_history.problem: Host 172.16.0.12 is unreachable (0/25 pings). Missing info: [1) source device/IP of the 25 pings; 2) R2 GigabitEthernet0/0/0 operational state and IP brief; 3) R2 ARP entry for 172.16.0.12; 4) result of a ping to 172.16.0.12 sourced from R2 (172.16.0.1); 5) server 172.16.0.12 power/NIC/link/IP status]. Assumption: pings target is on R2 LAN and remediation can be performed on router2. Operational risk: brief local LAN disruption if interface state is changed.
plan_history.fix_summary: On router2: ensure LAN interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0 is administratively up; clear R2 ARP entry for 172.16.0.12 to force ARP resolution.
